meta.homeDescription: RICORTU is a private travel memory app for collecting cities, lighting up countries, and preserving photos and memories without being tracked.
meta.privacyDescription: Read how RICORTU protects private travel memories, saved places, and personal atlas data.
meta.termsDescription: Read the RICORTU terms for using a private travel atlas and travel memory app.
meta.deleteTitle: Delete your RICORTU account and data
meta.deleteDescription: Request deletion of your RICORTU account, cloud data, synced travel memories, device identifiers, and related feedback records.

home.eyebrow: A private atlas for your travels
home.title: Turn your travels into a private atlas.
home.subtitle: Collect cities, light up countries, preserve photos and memories — without being tracked.
home.problemTitle: Travel memories rarely stay in one place.
home.problemText: They scatter across photos, notes, map pins, receipts, messages, and forgotten apps. The shape of a life in motion becomes hard to see, even when the places still matter.
home.valueTitle: A private archive for visited cities, countries, and collected territories.
home.value1Text: Mark the places you have lived, loved, passed through, and remembered.
home.value2Text: Watch countries and cities gather into a map that belongs only to you.
home.value3Text: Save quiet notes, dates, photos, and fragments without turning them into a feed.
home.value4Text: Keep the places you dream about close, without confusing them with where you have been.
home.difference: RICORTU is a private archive for the places that became part of you.
home.useTitle: Made for travelers who want memory, not performance.
home.use4: People who love maps and personal archives
home.previewTitle: Map, city detail, wishlist, stats, and share cards in one calm system.
home.seoTitle: A travel memory app for a quieter record.
home.seoText: RICORTU is designed for people looking for a personal travel map, a visited cities tracker, a travel archive app, a countries visited tracker, or a private travel journal app that keeps memory close without turning travel into performance.
home.waitlistTitle: Start building the map of your life.
home.waitlistText: Join the early access list for a private travel archive that is not a guide, a social feed, or a location tracker.

waitlist.privacy: We will only use your email for RICORTU early access updates. No public profile, no GPS tracking, no shared travel feed.
waitlist.success: You are on the waitlist. We will be in touch quietly.
waitlist.error: Unable to join the waitlist right now.

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.title: Privacy is part of the product.
privacy.intro: RICORTU is designed as a private travel journal and personal travel map. This page outlines the privacy principles intended for the app.
privacy.s1Text: We collect only the information needed to provide the app experience, such as account details and saved places.
privacy.s2Text: Visited cities, countries, notes, wishlists, and archive entries are treated as private personal content.
privacy.s3Text: RICORTU is not a GPS tracker. The product is designed around places you choose to save, not continuous location monitoring.
privacy.s4Text: Share cards are optional. Your atlas is private unless you intentionally choose to export or share something.
privacy.s5Text: Questions about privacy can be sent to hello@ricortu.com.

terms.label: Terms
terms.title: Terms for a calm personal archive.
terms.intro: These terms describe the intended use of RICORTU as a private travel memory app for saved places, visited cities, and personal notes.
terms.s1Text: RICORTU is intended for personal travel memory keeping, private map building, and saved destination planning.
terms.s2Text: You are responsible for the places, notes, and memories you add to your atlas.
terms.s3Text: RICORTU should not be used as a navigation system, safety tracker, or real-time location service.
terms.s4Text: Early product concepts and waitlist features may change as the app develops.
terms.s5Text: Questions about these terms can be sent to hello@ricortu.com.

deleteAccount.label: Data rights
deleteAccount.title: Delete your RICORTU account and data
deleteAccount.intro: You can request deletion of your RICORTU account and cloud data at any time.
deleteAccount.included1: Your Supabase account and account email.
deleteAccount.included2: Cloud-synced cities, travel dates, notes, photo metadata, and device identifier.
deleteAccount.included3: Feedback records that can be associated with your account or device ID.
deleteAccount.included4: If cloud photo sync is enabled in the future, uploaded photo files are included as well.
deleteAccount.notIncludedTitle: What is not deleted from our servers
deleteAccount.notIncluded1: Data stored only in the local SQLite database on your phone. To remove local-only data, uninstall the app or clear app data from your device settings.
deleteAccount.notIncluded2: Images, exports, or share cards that you already saved or shared somewhere outside RICORTU.
deleteAccount.requestText: Email support@ricortu.app with the subject line Delete my RICORTU account. Include the email address used for your RICORTU account. If you used RICORTU without signing in, provide the device ID from Settings or mention that your archive was local-only.
deleteAccount.timeline: We will process deletion requests within 30 days.
deleteAccount.faqLocalA: Photos and archive data stored only on your device are not uploaded to RICORTU. Delete the app or clear its app data to remove local-only data.
deleteAccount.faqSyncedA: Cloud-synced account data, cities, dates, notes, metadata, device identifiers, and associated feedback records are deleted after we verify and process your request.

footer.text: A private atlas for the cities, countries, and memories that became part of your life.
